name: Hartefeld National
about: Hartefeld National is a premier Delaware Valley golf club located in Avondale, PA. The venue features an 18-hole Tom Fazio-designed golf course that caters to golfers of all skill levels. In addition to the outdoor course, the club offers golf simulators and indoor/outdoor dining facilities with views of the surrounding countryside. Membership includes access to the Invited Network, providing reciprocal privileges at hundreds of other clubs nationwide, along with special offerings at hotels and entertainment venues. The facility emphasizes a combination of golf, culinary experiences, and social events to create a comprehensive private club environment.
why_golfers_like_it: Access to a premium Tom Fazio-designed championship golf course
State-of-the-art golf simulator technology for year-round play
Comprehensive golf instruction and club fitting services
Integration with the Invited Network for nationwide reciprocal play
Social and dining amenities with scenic countryside views

food_and_drink.notes: Full dining service available with indoor and outdoor options
Bar service available at Fazio's Golf Lounge

simulator_hardware.notes: Golf simulators available, specific hardware brands not specified

faq.question: Do I need my own clubs?
faq.answer: Yes, members are expected to bring their own clubs for both outdoor play and simulator use, though club fitting services are available.

faq.question: Can I bring food or drinks?
faq.answer: Outside food and drinks are not permitted as the club offers full dining and bar services on premises.

faq.question: How long does it take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: Outdoor course play times vary, but the venue also offers golf simulator options for quicker rounds or practice sessions.

faq.question: Is it kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, the club offers youth golf programs like 'Crush It! Youth Golf Lessons' and family-friendly amenities.
